title: 2D Arrays Coding
description: Coding challenges involving matrix row/column sums and diagonal sum computations.
subject: Programming

content.prompt: Read an integer n (size of square matrix). Then read n lines each containing n space-separated integers. Print the sum of each row on one line (space-separated), then the sum of each column on the next line (space-separated).
content.starterCode:
# TODO: Read n
n = int(input())

# TODO: Read n rows of n integers each
matrix = []
for i in range(n):
    row = list(map(int, input().split()))
    matrix.append(row)

# TODO: Calculate and print row sums (space-separated)
# TODO: Calculate and print column sums (space-separated)

content.prompt: Read an integer n (size of square matrix), then read n lines with n space-separated integers. Print the sum of the primary diagonal (top-left to bottom-right) and the sum of the secondary diagonal (top-right to bottom-left) on separate lines.
content.starterCode:
# TODO: Read n
n = int(input())

# TODO: Read the matrix
matrix = []
for i in range(n):
    row = list(map(int, input().split()))
    matrix.append(row)

# TODO: Calculate primary diagonal sum: matrix[i][i]
# TODO: Calculate secondary diagonal sum: matrix[i][n-1-i]
# Print each on a separate line
